properties.name: Mainland Amsterdam
properties.description: The main contiguous landmass south of the IJ: Centrum, Zuid, Oost, Oud-West, Nieuw-West, Zuidoost, etc.

properties.name: Amsterdam-Noord
properties.description: Everything north of the IJ waterway.

properties.name: Zeeburgereiland
properties.description: Small island east of Centrum, west of IJburg.

properties.name: IJburg
properties.description: Eastern islands in the IJmeer: Haveneiland, Rieteiland, Steigereiland, Centrumeiland, etc.
